symptom:
drone guesses 3 different prefix variants of the same file when file_read returns 'File not found' — data/tracks.json → workspace/deliverables/

/data/tracks.json → deliverables/

/data/tracks.json. 12 not-found errors across 6 sessions.
root_cause: file_read not-found error only echoes the requested path; drone has no way to reconcile its mental model against the actual filesystem shape
fix_approach: when file_read / file_edit return 'File not found', scan the workspace (bounded, deliverables-first) for up to 3 existing paths that match the requested basename or shape; append them to the error as 'Did you mean one of these existing paths?'
principle: v5 — give the drone one structural nudge (the actual path) rather than 12 rejections it can't converge on

desc: drone wrote workspace/... prefix but real file is under workspace/deliverables/neon-drift/data — suggest the right one
bare 'data/tracks.json' — basename match should surface the real path
totally wrong prefix — still finds the file by basename
typo in basename — fuzzy match catches it
